Thanks for opening a PR! Please fill in the sections below.

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? 1-3 sentences. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] docs: Documentation only
- [ ] test: Adding or refactoring tests
- [ ] chore: Build / tooling / dependency updates

## Breaking change

<!-- If this PR breaks public API or CLI behavior, describe the migration path.
     Otherwise write "None". -->

None

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this change? Bullet list is fine. -->

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Manual verification (if applicable):

## Related issues / PRs

<!-- "Closes #123", "Refs #456", or "None". -->

None

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated to cover the change
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `docs/`) if public behavior changed
- [ ] Base branch is correct (see CONTRIBUTING.md: usually the active release line `vX.Y`)
